# Sprint Gate — SP-R2-007: Documentation + Hardening

> Sprint: SP-R2-007 | Started: 2026-03-08 | Branch: Sprint7

## Sprint Goal
Documentation + Hardening — Comprehensive regression testing, mutation audit trail, tech debt reduction, full documentation suite, and final quality gate assessment.

## Definition of Ready Check

| Criterion | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| All stories have acceptance criteria | PASS |
| Dependencies from prior sprints resolved | PASS |
| Story points estimated (22 SP) | PASS |
| Sprint backlog finalized (7 stories: #56–#62) | PASS |

## Stories

| Story | Issue | Title | SP | Type | Priority | Status |
|-------|-------|-------|-----|------|----------|--------|
| SP-R2-007-001 | #56 | Comprehensive regression testing | 4 | CODE | HIGH | ✅ DONE |
| SP-R2-007-002 | #57 | User manual + technical manual | 4 | CONTENT | HIGH | ✅ DONE |
| SP-R2-007-003 | #58 | Tech debt reduction (<35/100) | 3 | CODE | MEDIUM | ✅ DONE |
| SP-R2-007-004 | #59 | Data dictionary | 2 | CONTENT | MEDIUM | ✅ DONE |
| SP-R2-007-005 | #60 | Mutation audit trail | 3 | CODE | MEDIUM | ✅ DONE |
| SP-R2-007-006 | #61 | README + CONTRIBUTING guide | 3 | CONTENT | HIGH | ✅ DONE |
| SP-R2-007-007 | #62 | Final quality gate assessment | 3 | ANALYSIS | HIGH | ✅ DONE |

## Lessons Learned Injection
- Sprint 6: Integration tests with InMemoryStore are fast and reliable
- Sprint 6: JSDoc annotations improve code clarity measurably
- Sprint 3: Function decomposition + DRY extraction significantly reduced complexity
- Sprint 1: Atomic writes and backup-on-write prevent data corruption

## Blockers
None at sprint start.
